import React from 'react'; import Statscard from '../components/Statscard'; import './dashboard.css'; const Dashboard = () => { return (

Hospital Overview

Real-time metrics and patient activity.

{/* Top Stat Cards Section */}
{/* Main Visuals Section */}
{/* Weekly Activity Box (Placeholder for Recharts) */}

Weekly Admissions Activity

{/* Once we install Recharts, the Bar Chart goes here */}
{/* Department Distribution Box */}

Patients by Department

  • Cardiology 35%
  • Neurology 20%
  • Orthopedics 25%
  • General Care 20%
); }; export default Dashboard;
